system¶

Tables¶

job_source¶

Name Type Description
name varchar  
job_type varchar  
config json  
id int4  

job¶

Name Type Description
type varchar  
description json  
size int8  
started timestamptz  
finished timestamptz  
job_source_id int4  
created timestamptz  
state job_state_enum  
id int4  

job_error_log¶

Name Type Description
job_id int4  
message varchar  

setting¶

Name Type Description
name text  
value text  
id int4  

job_queue¶

Name Type Description
job_id int4

Name Return Type Description
